description: Config-driven state-derivation registry + currentState rewire. Closes FGAP-017 (P2): add a config registry declaring which kinds are focus-eligible / next-ranked / blocked-checked, the ranking field, the blocked-by relation_type, the next-actions head-size (cap), and field+values -> open/blocked/done (leveraging the existing status_buckets); rewire currentState() (context-sdk.ts ~682-825) to read it instead of the hardcoded tasks/framework-gaps/phase + P0-P3 + task_depends_on_task literals AND the fixed NEXT_ACTIONS_CAP=15 slice (context-sdk.ts:864-865); the shipped conception declares framework-gaps+tasks so stock behavior is byte-preserved; with no declaration return a truthful not-configured signal (not silent empty). Advances FEAT-004.
acceptance_criteria: FGAP-017 closed: currentState derives from the config registry; against .context-jit-spec-v2 (custom vocabulary) it returns a real derivation or a truthful not-configured signal, not empty

The next-actions head-size is config-declared (replacing the hardcoded NEXT_ACTIONS_CAP=15 slice at context-sdk.ts:864-865); with the shipped conception, ready tasks are no longer truncated below open gaps — a runtime demo against .context (>=15 open gaps) surfaces ready tasks in the ranked head
Canonical pipeline green (incl. cross-substrate runtime demo against .context AND .context-jit-spec-v2 + fresh adversarial audit)
notes: Release-group: config-driven-state / FEAT-004 (R+1) | order 6 | addresses FGAP-017, FEAT-004
